title: Greenidge Announces New Self-Mined Bitcoin Retention Strategy for Growth
text: Greenidge Self-Mined Bitcoin Retention Strategy. Strategic Initiative: Greenidge announced new self-mined bitcoin retention strategy to accumulate bitcoin from owned miners. Aligned with belief in bitcoin and companys long-term growth prospects. Infrastructure Advantage: 122 MW total power capability. Approximately 8000 owned miners in operation across four active sites. Infrastructure to mine bitcoin at lower cost than vast majority of competitors. Financial Support: Secured $20 Million Committed Equity Facility to enhance financial flexibility. Supports execution on companys growth roadmap announced August 1 2024. Bitcoin Accumulation Results: As of August 13 2024 Greenidge retained 41 Bitcoin through new strategy. Liquidity Balanced: Balanced liquidity position with additional revenue from hosting business and electricity sales. Strategic Positioning: Bitcoin retention strategy reflects confidence in bitcoin appreciation. Long-term value creation through accumulated holdings. Operational Leverage: Self-mining cost advantages position company for profitable bitcoin accumulation.
